ddls:
CREATE TABLE "endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endpoint */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the endpoint is located */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the endpoint */,
  "protocol" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used by the endpoint */,
  "url" TEXT /* Full URL of the endpoint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the endpoint (e.g., active, deprecated, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the endpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the endpoint */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the endpoint will be deprecated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the endpoint is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoints_protocol FOREIGN KEY ("protocol") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoints_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., HTTPS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the protocol is secure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the protocol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the endpoint */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version will be deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_versions_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the endpoint */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the endpoint was accessed */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the endpoint */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request in milliseconds */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made to the endpoint */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Total number of errors encountered when accessing the endpoint */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the endpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric entry */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time in milliseconds */,
  "max_response_time" REAL /* Maximum response time in milliseconds */,
  "min_response_time" REAL /* Minimum response time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_metrics_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_level_agreements" (
  "sla_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SLA */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint associated with the SLA */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Guaranteed uptime percentage (e.g., 99.9) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time in milliseconds */,
  "penalty_clause" TEXT /* Description of penalties in case of SLA breaches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the SLA was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the SLA */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the SLA is currently active */,
  "last_breach" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last SLA breach */,
  "breach_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the SLA has been breached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sla_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_level_agreements_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "endpoint_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the endpoint this description refers to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the endpoint's functionality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the description */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review of the description */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_descriptions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_endpoint_descriptions_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)
